scope_note: QA phi-adic Period Tower cert [392]. Primary sources: Wall (1960) doi.org/10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541 (Pisano periods pi(p^n), Wall's question on p-adic Fibonacci periods); Ireland & Rosen (1990) ISBN 978-0-387-97329-6 Ch.13 (Cassini identity, norm multiplicativity); Serre (1979) ISBN 978-0-387-90236-7 (Witt vectors, p-adic structure). CLAIM: (A) N(sigma^k(1,0))=(-1)^(k+1) for all k (Cassini via norm multiplicativity of cert [391]); (B) pi(p^n)=p^(n-1)*pi(p) for all tested primes (inert {3,7,13,17}, split {11,19,29,41}, ramified {5}) and n=1..3 or 4; (C) Witt multiplier = p exactly at each level; (D) carries (F_pi(p)/p, (F_pi(p)+1-1)/p) mod p non-zero for p in {3,7,11,19,29} — no Wall-Sun-Sun prime in test set. 7 checks PASS + 8 fixtures (7 PASS, 1 FAIL designed). Extends [391] (sigma=x*phi) and [389] (Witt tower at p^2). Derived 2026-06-11.
